## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Maintenance
- [ ] Small feature

## Testing/build notes

Describe what you ran, or explain why no build/test was needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] Build passes if code changed.
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed.
- [ ] No unrelated changes.
- [ ] No generated files committed.
